artifacts.title: Similarweb estimated traffic — example-hr.com
artifacts.raw_text:
Similarweb estimated web analytics for example-hr.com (2026-04 to 2026-06). All values estimated.
- estimated_monthly_visits (estimated, visits/month): 1250000
- traffic_trend (estimated, visits/month): [{"period": "2026-04", "visits": 1180000}, {"period": "2026-05", "visits": 1215000}, {"period": "2026-06", "visits": 1250000}]
- channel_mix (estimated, share_of_traffic): {"direct": 0.41, "display": 0.02, "mail": 0.01, "organic_search": 0.33, "paid_search": 0.09, "referral": 0.08, "social": 0.06}
- top_countries (estimated, share_of_traffic): [{"country": "United States", "share": 0.38}, {"country": "United Kingdom", "share": 0.11}, {"country": "India", "share": 0.09}, {"country": "Germany", "share": 0.06}, {"country": "Canada", "share": 0.05}]
- digital_competitors (estimated, domain): [{"affinity": 0.62, "domain": "deel.com"}, {"affinity": 0.55, "domain": "remote.com"}, {"affinity": 0.4, "domain": "gusto.com"}]
- estimated_paid_keywords (estimated, keywords): 1800

metadata.exa_query: Using Similarweb, report web-analytics estimates for the domain example-hr.com: estimated monthly visits, the monthly traffic trend, the marketing channel mix shares (direct, referral, social, organic search, paid search, display, mail), the top countries by traffic share, digital competitors, and estimated paid keywords when available. Report only what Similarweb provides; omit unknown fields.
